404	        python -m pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt && \
405	        # Ensure that scipy-openblas is picked up by the numpy<1.26 build
406	        cat > \$HOME/.numpy-site.cfg <<EOL
407	        [openblas]
408	        libraries = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_library())')
409	        library_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_lib_dir())')
410	        include_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_include_dir())')
411	        runtime_library_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_lib_dir())')
412	        symbol_prefix = scipy_
413	        EOL
414	        python -m pip install numpy==2.0.0 -Cbuild-dir=numpy-builddir && \
415	        python -m pip install cython pybind11 pytest pytest-timeout pytest-xdist pytest-env mpmath pythran pooch meson hypothesis && \
416	        python -c 'import numpy as np; np.show_config()' && \
417	        spin build --with-scipy-openblas=32 && \
418	        spin test"
419	
420	  #################################################################################
421	  distro_multiple_pythons:
422	    # Purpose is to build for a non-default Python interpreter in a Linux distro
423	    # For such a build config, `python`/`python3` executables may not have
424	    # build dependencies like Cython or NumPy installed.
425	    name: non-default Python interpreter, fast, py3.12/npMin, pip+pytest
426	    needs: get_commit_message
427	    if: >
428	      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
429	      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
430	    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
431	    steps:
432	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
433	        with:
434	          submodules: recursive
435	          persist-credentials: false
436	
437	      - name: Setup system dependencies
438	        run: |
439	          sudo apt-get -y update
440	          sudo apt install software-properties-common
441	          sudo add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa
442	          sudo apt update -y
443	          sudo apt install -y python3.12-dev ninja-build pkg-config libatlas-base-dev \
444	            liblapack-dev ccache
445	
446	      - name: Set up ccache
447	        uses: ./.github/ccache
448	        with:
449	          workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
450	          job_name: ${{ github.job }}
451	
452	      - name: Setup Python build deps
453	        run: |
454	          python3.12 -m pip install build pythran pybind11 cython numpy meson-python
455	
456	      - name: Build wheel and install
457	        run: |
458	          python3.12 -m build -wnx -Csetup-args=-Dblas=blas-atlas -Csetup-args=-Dlapack=lapack-atlas
459	          python3.12 -m pip install dist/*.whl
460	
461	      - name: Ccache performance
462	        shell: bash -l {0}
463	        run: |
464	          ccache --evict-older-than 1d
465	          ccache -s
466	
467	      - name: Install test dependencies
468	        run: |
469	          python3.12 -m pip install pytest hypothesis
470	
471	      - name: Run tests
472	        run: |
473	          # Just a small subset of tests; this will be fine if the build
474	          # succeeds (that's the real purpose of this job)
475	          pushd $RUNNER_TEMP
476	          python3.12 -m pytest --pyargs scipy.cluster
477	          python3.12 -m pytest --pyargs scipy.linalg
478	          popd
479	
480	  #################################################################################
481	  meson_global_install:
482	    # Check that `meson` can be used from anywhere. The environment Meson is
483	    # installed in doesn't have to have any other build dependencies in it
484	    # (i.e., we're using it as a binary). This isn't a normal setup, but it's
485	    # sometimes being used that way - see gh-20535 and gh-24406
486	    name: build with global meson
487	    needs: get_commit_message
488	    if: >
489	      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
490	      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
491	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
492	    steps:
493	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
494	        with:
495	          submodules: recursive
496	          fetch-tags: true
497	          persist-credentials: false
498	
499	      - name: Install system dependencies
500	        run: |
501	          sudo apt-get update
502	          sudo apt-get install -y gfortran pkg-config libopenblas-dev liblapack-dev \
503	            ccache
504	
505	      - name: Set up ccache
506	        uses: ./.github/ccache
507	        with:
508	          workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
509	          job_name: ${{ github.job }}
510	
511	      - name: Install global meson
512	        run: |
513	          python -m pip install meson --break-system-packages
514	
515	      - name: Setup Python
516	        uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
517	        with:
518	          python-version: "3.14"
519	
520	      - name: Setup Python build/test deps
521	        run: |
522	          python -m pip install -r requirements/build.txt
523	          python -m pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt
524	          python -m pip install build pytest hypothesis
525	          # Remove `meson` from environment
526	          python -m pip uninstall meson --yes
527	
528	      - name: Check we're using global Meson
529	        run: |
530	          which meson
531	
532	      - name: Build wheel and install
533	        run: |
534	          python -m build -wnx
535	          python -m pip install dist/*.whl
536	
537	      - name: Ccache performance
538	        shell: bash -l {0}
539	        run: |
540	          ccache --evict-older-than 1d
541	          ccache -s
542	
543	      - name: Run tests
544	        run: |
545	          # Just a small subset of tests; this will be fine if the build
546	          # succeeds (that's the real purpose of this job)
547	          pushd $RUNNER_TEMP
548	          python -m pytest --pyargs scipy.linalg
549	          popd
550	
551	  #################################################################################
552	  free-threaded:
553	    name: free-threaded
554	    needs: get_commit_message
555	    strategy:
556	      matrix:
557	        parallel: ['0', '1']
558	
559	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
560	    if: >
561	      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
562	      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
563	    steps:
564	    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
565	      with:
566	        submodules: recursive
567	        fetch-tags: true
568	        persist-credentials: false
569	
570	    - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
571	      with:
572	        python-version: '3.14t-dev'
573	
574	    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
575	      run: |
576	        sudo apt-get update
577	        sudo apt-get install -y gfortran ccache
578	
579	    - name: Set up ccache
580	      uses: ./.github/ccache
581	      with:
582	        workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
583	        job_name: ${{ github.job }}
584	
585	    - name: Install Python dependencies
586	      run: |
587	        pip install -r requirements/build.txt
588	        pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt
589	        pip install spin pytest pytest-xdist threadpoolctl pooch hypothesis "click<8.3.0"
590	
591	    - name: Install pytest-run-parallel
592	      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '1'}}
593	      run: |
594	        pip install pytest-run-parallel
595	        pip uninstall --yes pytest-xdist
596	
597	    - name: Build SciPy
598	      run: |
599	        spin build --with-scipy-openblas=32
600	
601	    - name: Ccache performance
602	      shell: bash -l {0}
603	      run: |
604	        ccache --evict-older-than 1d
605	        ccache -s
606	
607	    - name: Run tests (full)
608	      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '0'}}
609	      run: |
610	        spin test -j4 -m full --durations=10
611	
612	    - name: Run tests (fast, with pytest-run-parallel)
613	      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '1'}}
614	      env:
615	        # Excluded modules:
616	        # - scipy.spatial has multiple issues  in kdtree/qhull, and gh-20655 is pending.
617	        TEST_SUBMODULES: >-
618	          scipy._lib
619	          scipy.cluster
620	          scipy.constants
621	          scipy.datasets
622	          scipy.differentiate
623	          scipy.fft
624	          scipy.fftpack
625	          scipy.integrate
626	          scipy.interpolate
627	          scipy.io
628	          scipy.linalg
629	          scipy.misc
630	          scipy.ndimage
631	          scipy.optimize
632	          scipy.signal
633	          scipy.sparse
634	          scipy.special
635	          scipy.stats
636	      run: |
637	        # Note: Only fast tests; full test suite is unlikely to uncover anything more,
638	        #       and it'll be quite slow with pytest-run-parallel. Also skip
639	        #       tests that won't run in parallel, those are covered by the
640	        #       parallel == 0 run.
641	        spin test -t $TEST_SUBMODULES -- --parallel-threads=4 --skip-thread-unsafe=true
642	
643	  #################################################################################
644	  clang-18-build-only:
645	    # Purpose is to check for warnings in builds with latest clang.
646	    # We do not run the test suite here.
647	    name: Clang-18 build-only (-Werror)
648	    needs: get_commit_message
649	    if: >
650	      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
651	      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
652	    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
653	    steps:
654	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
655	        with:
656	          submodules: recursive
657	          persist-credentials: false
658	
659	      - name: Setup Python
660	        uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
661	        with:
662	          python-version: "3.12"
663	
664	      - name: Setup system dependencies
665	        run: |
666	          sudo apt-get -y update
667	          sudo apt install -y libopenblas-dev liblapack-dev
668	
669	      - name: Setup Python build deps
670	        run: |
671	          pip install -r requirements/build.txt
672	          pip install build
673	
674	      - name: Build wheel, check for compiler warnings
675	        run: |
676	          # if clang-18 isn't installed this should fail
677	          clang-18 --version
678	          # specify which compilers to use using environment variables
679	          CC=clang-18 CXX=clang++-18 FC=gfortran python -m build -wnx -Csetup-args=--werror
680	
681	  #################################################################################
682	  test_aarch64:
683	    name: aarch64, fast, fail slow, py3.12/npAny, spin
684	    needs: get_commit_message
685	    if: >
686	      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
687	      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
688	    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04-arm
689	    steps:
690	    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
691	      with:
692	        submodules: recursive
693	        persist-credentials: false
694	
695	    - name: Setup Python
696	      uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
697	      with:
698	        python-version: '3.12'
699	
700	    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
701	      run: |
702	        sudo apt-get update
703	        sudo apt-get install -y libopenblas-dev libatlas-base-dev liblapack-dev \
704	          gfortran libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libsuitesparse-dev ccache libmpc-dev
705	
706	    - name: Install Python packages
707	      run: |
708	        python -m pip install -r requirements/build.txt -r requirements/test.txt -r requirements/dev.txt
709	        # We want to check for test timing only in a single job, on Linux, running the
710	        # fast test suite. This is that job. See gh-20806 for previous issues
711	        # after running this job on Windows and in multiple jobs.
712	        python -m pip install pytest-fail-slow
713	
714	    - name: Build SciPy
715	      run: |
716	        spin build
717	
718	    - name: Test SciPy
719	      run: |
720	        export OMP_NUM_THREADS=2
721	        spin test -- --durations=0 --durations-min=0.5 --fail-slow=1.0
722	
723	  #################################################################################

file.content:
name: Linux tests

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - maintenance/**
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - maintenance/**

permissions:
   contents: read  # to fetch code (actions/checkout)

env:
  CCACHE_DIR: "${{ github.workspace }}/.ccache"
  CCACHE_MAXSIZE: "250M"

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.head_ref || github.run_id }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  get_commit_message:
    name: Get commit message
    uses: ./.github/workflows/commit_message.yml

  test_meson:
    name: mypy (py3.12) & dev deps (py3.14), fast, spin
    needs: get_commit_message
    # If using act to run CI locally the github object does not exist and
    # the usual skipping should not be enforced
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    strategy:
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.12', '3.14-dev'] # this run will use python dev versions when available
        maintenance-branch:
          - ${{ contains(github.ref, 'maintenance/') || contains(github.base_ref, 'maintenance/') }}
        exclude:
          - maintenance-branch: true
            python-version: '3.14-dev'

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        persist-credentials: false

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        allow-prereleases: true

    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
      run: |
        # NOTE: not the same OpenBLAS version as in upstream CI (I'm being lazy here)
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y libopenblas-dev libatlas-base-dev liblapack-dev gfortran libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libsuitesparse-dev ccache libmpc-dev

    - name: Install Python packages
      if: matrix.python-version == '3.12'
      run: |
        python -m pip install numpy cython pytest pytest-xdist pytest-timeout pybind11 mpmath gmpy2 pythran ninja meson pooch hypothesis spin "click<8.3.0"

    - name: Install Python packages from repositories
      if: matrix.python-version == '3.14-dev' # this run will use python dev versions when available
      run: |
        python -m pip install git+https://github.com/numpy/numpy.git
        python -m pip install ninja cython pytest pybind11 pytest-xdist pytest-timeout spin pooch hypothesis "setuptools<67.3" meson "click<8.3.0"
        python -m pip install git+https://github.com/serge-sans-paille/pythran.git
        # Disable Meson master testing until upstream option handling is fixed, see scipy#22534
        # python -m pip install git+https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson.git

    - name: Set up ccache
      uses: ./.github/ccache
      with:
        workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
        job_name: ${{ github.job }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Setup build and install scipy
      run: |
        spin build --release

    - name: Ccache performance
      shell: bash -l {0}
      run: |
        ccache --evict-older-than 1d
        ccache -s

    - name: Check installed files
      run: |
        spin check --installed-files --no-build

    - name: Check symbol hiding
      run: |
        spin check --symbol-hiding --no-build

    - name: Check usage of install tags
      run: |
        rm -r build-install
        spin build --tags=runtime,python-runtime,devel
        python tools/check_installation.py build-install --no-tests
        rm -r build-install
        spin build --tags=runtime,python-runtime,devel,tests
        spin check --installed-files --no-build

    - name: Check xp markers
      run: |
        spin check --xp-markers --no-build

    - name: Check build-internal dependencies
      run: ninja -C build -t missingdeps

    - name: Mypy
      if: matrix.python-version == '3.12'
      run: |
        # Packages that are only needed for their annotations
        python -m pip install mypy==1.19.1 types-psutil typing_extensions
        python -m pip install pybind11 sphinx

        spin mypy

    - name: Pyrefly
      if: matrix.python-version == '3.12'
      run: |
        python -m pip install -r requirements/dev.txt
        pyrefly check --output-format=github

    - name: Test SciPy
      run: |
        export OMP_NUM_THREADS=2
        spin test -j3 -- --durations 10 --timeout=60

  #################################################################################
  test_venv_install:
    name: Install into venv, cluster only, pyAny/npAny, pip+cluster.test()
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        persist-credentials: false

    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
      run: |
        # We're not running the full test suite here, only testing the install
        # into a venv is working, so leave out optional dependencies. That's
        # also why we can get away with an old version of OpenBLAS from Ubuntu
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y python3-dev libopenblas-dev pkg-config gfortran \
          ccache

    - name: Set up ccache
      uses: ./.github/ccache
      with:
        workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
        job_name: ${{ github.job }}

    - name: Create venv, install SciPy
      run: |
        python -m venv ../venvs/scipy-venv
        source ../venvs/scipy-venv/bin/activate
        # Note that this uses build isolation. That's why we don't need build
        # dependencies to be installed in the venv itself.
        python -m pip install . -vv -Csetup-args=--werror

    - name: Basic imports and tests
      run: |
        source ../venvs/scipy-venv/bin/activate
        cd ..
        python -c "import scipy"
        python -c "import scipy.linalg"
        python -m pip install pytest hypothesis
        python -c "from scipy import cluster; cluster.test()"

    - name: Create venv inside source tree
      # This is a regression test for gh-16312
      run: |
        python -m venv .venv
        source .venv/bin/activate
        # Install build dependencies. Use meson-python from its main branch,
        # most convenient to test in this job because we're using pip without
        # build isolation here.
        python -m pip install numpy pybind11 pythran cython pytest ninja hypothesis
        python -m pip install git+https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson-python.git
        # Non-isolated build, so we use dependencies installed inside the source tree
        python -m pip install -U pip  # need pip >=23 for `--config-settings`
        python -m pip install . -v --no-build-isolation

        # Basic tests
        cd ..
        python -c "import scipy"
        python -c "import scipy.linalg"
        python -c "from scipy import cluster; cluster.test()"

    - name: Ccache performance
      shell: bash -l {0}
      run: |
        ccache --evict-older-than 1d
        ccache -s

  #################################################################################
  python_debug:
    # also uses the vcs->sdist->wheel route.
    name: Python-debug & ATLAS & sdist+wheel, fast, py3.12/npMin, pip+pytest
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04  # provides python3.12-dbg
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          submodules: recursive
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Configuring Test Environment
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt install python3-dbg python3-dev libatlas-base-dev liblapack-dev \
            gfortran libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libmpc-dev
          python3-dbg --version # just to check
          python3-dbg -c 'import sys; print("Python debug build:", hasattr(sys, "gettotalrefcount"))'

      - name: Build SciPy
        run: |
          python3-dbg -m pip install build
          # Note: we are testing installion via sdist, so can't use `ccache` in this job
          python3-dbg -m build -Csetup-args=-Dbuildtype=debugoptimized -Csetup-args=-Dblas=blas-atlas -Csetup-args=-Dlapack=lapack-atlas
          python3-dbg -m pip install dist/scipy*.whl

      - name: Testing SciPy
        run: |
          cd doc
          python3-dbg -m pip install pytest pytest-xdist pytest-timeout mpmath gmpy2 threadpoolctl pooch hypothesis
          python3-dbg -m pytest --pyargs scipy -n4 --durations=10 -m "not slow"

  #################################################################################
  gcc9:
    # Purpose is to examine builds with oldest-supported gcc and test with pydata/sparse.
    name: Oldest GCC & pydata/sparse, full, py3.12/npMin, pip+pytest
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          submodules: recursive
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Setup system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get -y update
          sudo apt install -y g++-9 gcc-9 gfortran-9
          sudo apt install -y libatlas-base-dev liblapack-dev libgmp-dev \
            libmpfr-dev libmpc-dev pkg-config libsuitesparse-dev liblapack-dev ccache

      - name: Setup Python build deps
        run: |
          pip install meson-python ninja pythran pybind11 cython numpy


      - name: Set up ccache
        uses: ./.github/ccache
        with:
          workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
          job_name: ${{ github.job }}

      - name: Build wheel and install
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          export PYTHONOPTIMIZE=2

          # specify which compilers to use using environment variables
          CC="ccache gcc-9" CXX="ccache g++-9" FC="ccache gfortran-9" python -m pip install . -v \
              --no-build-isolation -Cbuild-dir=build \
              -Csetup-args=-Dblas=blas-atlas -Csetup-args=-Dlapack=lapack-atlas

      - name: Ccache performance
        shell: bash -l {0}
        run: |
          ccache --evict-older-than 1d
          ccache -s

      - name: Install test dependencies
        run: |
          # Downgrade numpy to oldest supported version
          pip install gmpy2 threadpoolctl mpmath pooch pytest pytest-xdist==2.5.0 pytest-timeout hypothesis sparse "numpy==2.0.0"

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          # can't be in source directory
          pushd $RUNNER_TEMP
          export PYTHONOPTIMIZE=2
          python -m pytest --pyargs scipy -n4 --durations=10
          popd

  #################################################################################
  prerelease_deps_coverage_64bit_blas:
    # TODO: re-enable ILP64 build.
    name: Prerelease deps & coverage report, full, py3.12/npMin & py3.13/npPre, spin, SCIPY_ARRAY_API=1
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.12']

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        persist-credentials: false

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libmpc-dev ccache gfortran \
          lcov ccache

    - name: Install Python packages
      run: |
        python -m pip install cython pythran ninja meson-python pybind11 spin "click<8.3.0"
        python -m pip install --pre --upgrade pytest pytest-cov pytest-xdist mpmath gmpy2 threadpoolctl pooch hypothesis matplotlib
        python -m pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt
        python -m pip install --pre --upgrade --timeout=60 -i https://pypi.anaconda.org/scientific-python-nightly-wheels/simple numpy

    - name: Set up ccache
      uses: ./.github/ccache
      with:
        workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
        job_name: ${{ github.job }}

    - name: Build and install SciPy
      run: |
        spin build --gcov --with-scipy-openblas=32 --release

    - name: Ccache performance
      shell: bash -l {0}
      run: |
        ccache --evict-older-than 1d
        ccache -s

    - name: Downgrade NumPy to lowest supported
      run: |
        python -m pip install "numpy==2.0.0"

    - name: Test SciPy
      run: |
        export OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1
        export SCIPY_ARRAY_API=1
        spin test --no-build --coverage -j2 --mode full -- --cov --cov-report term-missing

  #################################################################################
  linux_32bit:
    name: 32-bit, fast, py3.12/npMin, spin
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    # I tried running directly in a container:, using the image: and options:
    # entries. Unfortunately at this time options: does not seem to listen to
    # --platform linux/i386.
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        persist-credentials: false

    - name: build + test in i686 container
      run: |
        set -exuo pipefail
        # Note: `ccache` not used because it isn't available on i686 CentOS 7
        docker pull quay.io/pypa/manylinux2014_i686
        docker run -v $(pwd):/scipy --platform=linux/i386 quay.io/pypa/manylinux2014_i686 /bin/bash -c "cd /scipy && \
        uname -a && \
        python3.12 -m venv test && \
        source test/bin/activate && \
        python -m pip install spin 'click<8.3.0' meson ninja && \
        python -m pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt && \
        # Ensure that scipy-openblas is picked up by the numpy<1.26 build
        cat > \$HOME/.numpy-site.cfg <<EOL
        [openblas]
        libraries = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_library())')
        library_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_lib_dir())')
        include_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_include_dir())')
        runtime_library_dirs = \$(python -c 'import scipy_openblas32; print(scipy_openblas32.get_lib_dir())')
        symbol_prefix = scipy_
        EOL
        python -m pip install numpy==2.0.0 -Cbuild-dir=numpy-builddir && \
        python -m pip install cython pybind11 pytest pytest-timeout pytest-xdist pytest-env mpmath pythran pooch meson hypothesis && \
        python -c 'import numpy as np; np.show_config()' && \
        spin build --with-scipy-openblas=32 && \
        spin test"

  #################################################################################
  distro_multiple_pythons:
    # Purpose is to build for a non-default Python interpreter in a Linux distro
    # For such a build config, `python`/`python3` executables may not have
    # build dependencies like Cython or NumPy installed.
    name: non-default Python interpreter, fast, py3.12/npMin, pip+pytest
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          submodules: recursive
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get -y update
          sudo apt install software-properties-common
          sudo add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa
          sudo apt update -y
          sudo apt install -y python3.12-dev ninja-build pkg-config libatlas-base-dev \
            liblapack-dev ccache

      - name: Set up ccache
        uses: ./.github/ccache
        with:
          workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
          job_name: ${{ github.job }}

      - name: Setup Python build deps
        run: |
          python3.12 -m pip install build pythran pybind11 cython numpy meson-python

      - name: Build wheel and install
        run: |
          python3.12 -m build -wnx -Csetup-args=-Dblas=blas-atlas -Csetup-args=-Dlapack=lapack-atlas
          python3.12 -m pip install dist/*.whl

      - name: Ccache performance
        shell: bash -l {0}
        run: |
          ccache --evict-older-than 1d
          ccache -s

      - name: Install test dependencies
        run: |
          python3.12 -m pip install pytest hypothesis

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          # Just a small subset of tests; this will be fine if the build
          # succeeds (that's the real purpose of this job)
          pushd $RUNNER_TEMP
          python3.12 -m pytest --pyargs scipy.cluster
          python3.12 -m pytest --pyargs scipy.linalg
          popd

  #################################################################################
  meson_global_install:
    # Check that `meson` can be used from anywhere. The environment Meson is
    # installed in doesn't have to have any other build dependencies in it
    # (i.e., we're using it as a binary). This isn't a normal setup, but it's
    # sometimes being used that way - see gh-20535 and gh-24406
    name: build with global meson
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          submodules: recursive
          fetch-tags: true
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y gfortran pkg-config libopenblas-dev liblapack-dev \
            ccache

      - name: Set up ccache
        uses: ./.github/ccache
        with:
          workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
          job_name: ${{ github.job }}

      - name: Install global meson
        run: |
          python -m pip install meson --break-system-packages

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: "3.14"

      - name: Setup Python build/test deps
        run: |
          python -m pip install -r requirements/build.txt
          python -m pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt
          python -m pip install build pytest hypothesis
          # Remove `meson` from environment
          python -m pip uninstall meson --yes

      - name: Check we're using global Meson
        run: |
          which meson

      - name: Build wheel and install
        run: |
          python -m build -wnx
          python -m pip install dist/*.whl

      - name: Ccache performance
        shell: bash -l {0}
        run: |
          ccache --evict-older-than 1d
          ccache -s

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          # Just a small subset of tests; this will be fine if the build
          # succeeds (that's the real purpose of this job)
          pushd $RUNNER_TEMP
          python -m pytest --pyargs scipy.linalg
          popd

  #################################################################################
  free-threaded:
    name: free-threaded
    needs: get_commit_message
    strategy:
      matrix:
        parallel: ['0', '1']

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        fetch-tags: true
        persist-credentials: false

    - uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
      with:
        python-version: '3.14t-dev'

    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y gfortran ccache

    - name: Set up ccache
      uses: ./.github/ccache
      with:
        workflow_name: ${{ github.workflow }}
        job_name: ${{ github.job }}

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      run: |
        pip install -r requirements/build.txt
        pip install -r requirements/openblas.txt
        pip install spin pytest pytest-xdist threadpoolctl pooch hypothesis "click<8.3.0"

    - name: Install pytest-run-parallel
      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '1'}}
      run: |
        pip install pytest-run-parallel
        pip uninstall --yes pytest-xdist

    - name: Build SciPy
      run: |
        spin build --with-scipy-openblas=32

    - name: Ccache performance
      shell: bash -l {0}
      run: |
        ccache --evict-older-than 1d
        ccache -s

    - name: Run tests (full)
      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '0'}}
      run: |
        spin test -j4 -m full --durations=10

    - name: Run tests (fast, with pytest-run-parallel)
      if: ${{ matrix.parallel == '1'}}
      env:
        # Excluded modules:
        # - scipy.spatial has multiple issues  in kdtree/qhull, and gh-20655 is pending.
        TEST_SUBMODULES: >-
          scipy._lib
          scipy.cluster
          scipy.constants
          scipy.datasets
          scipy.differentiate
          scipy.fft
          scipy.fftpack
          scipy.integrate
          scipy.interpolate
          scipy.io
          scipy.linalg
          scipy.misc
          scipy.ndimage
          scipy.optimize
          scipy.signal
          scipy.sparse
          scipy.special
          scipy.stats
      run: |
        # Note: Only fast tests; full test suite is unlikely to uncover anything more,
        #       and it'll be quite slow with pytest-run-parallel. Also skip
        #       tests that won't run in parallel, those are covered by the
        #       parallel == 0 run.
        spin test -t $TEST_SUBMODULES -- --parallel-threads=4 --skip-thread-unsafe=true

  #################################################################################
  clang-18-build-only:
    # Purpose is to check for warnings in builds with latest clang.
    # We do not run the test suite here.
    name: Clang-18 build-only (-Werror)
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
        with:
          submodules: recursive
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Setup system dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get -y update
          sudo apt install -y libopenblas-dev liblapack-dev

      - name: Setup Python build deps
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements/build.txt
          pip install build

      - name: Build wheel, check for compiler warnings
        run: |
          # if clang-18 isn't installed this should fail
          clang-18 --version
          # specify which compilers to use using environment variables
          CC=clang-18 CXX=clang++-18 FC=gfortran python -m build -wnx -Csetup-args=--werror

  #################################################################################
  test_aarch64:
    name: aarch64, fast, fail slow, py3.12/npAny, spin
    needs: get_commit_message
    if: >
      needs.get_commit_message.outputs.message == 1
      && (github.repository == 'scipy/scipy' || github.repository == '')
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04-arm
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      with:
        submodules: recursive
        persist-credentials: false

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@a309ff8b426b58ec0e2a45f0f869d46889d02405 # v6.2.0
      with:
        python-version: '3.12'

    - name: Install Ubuntu dependencies
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y libopenblas-dev libatlas-base-dev liblapack-dev \
          gfortran libgmp-dev libmpfr-dev libsuitesparse-dev ccache libmpc-dev

    - name: Install Python packages
      run: |
        python -m pip install -r requirements/build.txt -r requirements/test.txt -r requirements/dev.txt
        # We want to check for test timing only in a single job, on Linux, running the
        # fast test suite. This is that job. See gh-20806 for previous issues
        # after running this job on Windows and in multiple jobs.
        python -m pip install pytest-fail-slow

    - name: Build SciPy
      run: |
        spin build

    - name: Test SciPy
      run: |
        export OMP_NUM_THREADS=2
        spin test -- --durations=0 --durations-min=0.5 --fail-slow=1.0

  #################################################################################

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CCACHE_DIR="/app/.ccache"
ENV CCACHE_MAXSIZE="250M"

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    libopenblas-dev \
    libatlas-base-dev \
    liblapack-dev \
    gfortran \
    libgmp-dev \
    libmpfr-dev \
    libsuitesparse-dev \
    ccache \
    libmpc-dev \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    git \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python 3.14-dev
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.14-dev \
    python3.14-venv \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Install Python packages from repositories (Python 3.14-dev build)
RUN python3.14 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && \
    python3.14 -m pip install git+https://github.com/numpy/numpy.git && \
    python3.14 -m pip install ninja cython pytest pybind11 pytest-xdist pytest-timeout spin pooch hypothesis "setuptools<67.3" meson "click<8.3.0" && \
    python3.14 -m pip install git+https://github.com/serge-sans-paille/pythran.git

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CCACHE_DIR="/app/.ccache"
ENV CCACHE_MAXSIZE="250M"

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    libopenblas-dev \
    libatlas-base-dev \
    liblapack-dev \
    gfortran \
    libgmp-dev \
    libmpfr-dev \
    libsuitesparse-dev \
    ccache \
    libmpc-dev \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    git \
    pkg-config \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python 3.14-dev
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    software-properties-common \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.14-dev \
    python3.14-venv \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

# Install Python packages from repositories (Python 3.14-dev build)
RUN python3.14 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && \
    python3.14 -m pip install git+https://github.com/numpy/numpy.git && \
    python3.14 -m pip install ninja cython pytest pybind11 pytest-xdist pytest-timeout spin pooch hypothesis "setuptools<67.3" meson "click<8.3.0" && \
    python3.14 -m pip install git+https://github.com/serge-sans-paille/pythran.git

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
